text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: Cash branch is LOCAL ONLY; the Purchase Head decides cash vs credit at assignment. Cash buys have NO PO: the buyer inquires showroom availability, pays from a configurable petty-cash float (e.g. OMR 300), and stores raise a cash GRN with no PO reference. The system logs the receipt and

deducts the float. When the balance falls to about one third of the allotment, the buyer requests reimbursement; Finance maker prepares and checker approves (SoD), and the float is topped back up to its allotment. Cash spend is reported alongside credit spend in one unified view.
